character.name: SuYao
character.prompt:
Tactics Ogre Let Us Cling Together SNES style chibi female battle mage, western fantasy,
semi-chibi proportion, slender graceful build, formal regal stance, tactical silhouette,
young woman early 20s with calm gentle face,
long silver hair flowing past shoulders, short hair bangs across forehead, head bare,
wearing layered ivory and royal blue robe with crimson sash and gold embroidery on hem and sleeves, robe falls to ankles,
ornate brass pauldrons with engraved trim on shoulders,
deep blue cloak with red inner lining draped behind to mid-calf,
heavy hood fabric folded flat at the upper back behind the neck, hood NEVER pulled up over the head,
tall wooden staff with large sapphire blue crystal orb on top, held vertically in right hand at side,
left hand resting empty at left side,
brown leather belt with bronze buckle and small hanging scroll pouches at waist,
long silver hair drawn IN FRONT OF and OVER the deep blue cloak,
no plate armor, no shield, no helmet,
16-bit SNES pixel art, muted earthy desaturated palette, hand-painted dithered shading, sharp readable silhouette
